group.name: Achievements
group.str: Click on any blocked menu option in the Impostor V4 fake menus
Click on any blocked menu option in the Impostor V4 fake menus.
Beat Black in Impostor V4's Finale, then have him reset the game and alter reality.
Enter the lobby for the first time.
Beat Polus Problems without missing a single note on Hard difficulty.
Abruptly interrumpt any Polus Problems song or dialogue by reporting the dead bodies.
Play any Polus Problems song as the Boyfriend skin "Mini Red".
Try to purchase a shop item without having the enough beans for it.
Input a secret code in the Title Screen to access the fake Impostor V4 menus.
